candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Could be a component only; less complete than cash and cash equivalents.
Restricted cash is typically excluded from CHE.

candidates.why: Cash-flow ending balance reconciles to balance-sheet cash, but balance-sheet label is preferred.

candidates.why: Not the balance-sheet current period line.
Not cash balance.

candidates.why: Not cash balance.
Not cash balance.

candidates.why: Exact total for current liabilities.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Debt component only, not total current liabilities.
Balancing row, not reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Represents current portion of debt; suitable for short-term debt when lease lines are excluded.

variables.notes: Ambiguity between 'Current maturities' and 'Interest-bearing current liabilities'. The latter appears to be a clean current debt total in some years, while 'Current maturities' may be the current portion of long-term debt. Including both may risk overlap in years like 2020. Manual review recommended to determine whether 'Interest-bearing current liabilities' already includes 'Current maturities'. Lease rows were excluded.

candidates.why: Exact taxes payable/current tax liability label.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit tax payable line.

candidates.why: Best available reported total for property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets, net of depreciation.
Would be gross PPE if populated, but appears unavailable and net total is cleaner.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related asset component, not baseline PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total.
Intangibles are not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Purchase of PPE and intangible assets
candidates.why: Cash-flow capex, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Sale of PPE and intangible assets
candidates.why: Cash-flow disposal proceeds, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Gains/Losses on disposals of PPE and intangible assets
candidates.why: Income/cash-flow adjustment, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Used the reported total tangible assets net line as the closest PPE measure. Excluded right-of-use assets from baseline PPE.
